svg.title: ML/AI Learning Roadmap for AWS Data Engineers
svg.desc: A 5-phase learning roadmap from math foundations to building AI agents, tailored for those with AWS data engineering experience.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed week-by-week study plan for Phase 1: Math & ML Foundations, assuming I have AWS data engineering experience')
g.text: Weeks 1–4 · Your AWS stats knowledge gives you a head start
· Leverage: S3 + pandas pipelines you already know

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed week-by-week study plan for Phase 2: Deep Learning & Neural Networks, with project ideas for an AWS data engineer')
g.text: · CNNs for images, RNNs/LSTMs for sequences
· Leverage: SageMaker + your existing AWS IAM/VPC knowledge

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed study plan for Phase 3: Transformers & Generative AI, with hands-on project ideas using AWS')
g.text: Weeks 11–16 · The core of modern AI
· HuggingFace: fine-tuning LLMs on custom data
· Leverage: Glue + Bedrock + your ETL pipeline expertise

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed study plan for Phase 4: Building AI Agents, with project ideas that use my AWS data engineering skills')
g.text: Weeks 17–22 · Where your data pipeline skills shine
· AWS Bedrock Agents + Step Functions orchestration
· Leverage: EventBridge + Lambda + your workflow automation skills

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed study plan for Phase 5: MLOps & Production AI Systems, with AWS-specific tools and certifications to target')
g.text: Weeks 23–28 · Deploy and scale what you've built
· CI/CD for ML: testing, versioning, drift detection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which AWS certifications complement an ML learning path? Which should I do first?')
g.text: Your AWS edge: target AWS ML Specialty cert alongside Phase 4–5
